title: As Above, So Below
original_title: كما في السماء، كذلك على الأرض
overview: This hushed, pared-down essay weaves together different facts and myths surrounding the moon: images, texts, and sounds are spun into a dense, delicate tissue of ideas, with humans both at the centre and infinitely small in this celestial context.
